pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 11, export_result.sh line 11
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 14-18 show file is sourced from this path
Metadata value exists but verifier.py does not validate it. Verifier only checks if output_size > original_size * 1.05. Input file is 33,868 bytes (33 KB), so this constraint appears unused.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real FreeCAD model file (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd, 33 KB) created by FreeCAD contributor @hasecilu. The model is a parametric mechanical design of a T8 lead screw housing bracket (a real mechanical component used in 3D printers), with features including sketches, pads, holes, and polar patterns. The input and output file paths are correctly specified. The min_expected_size_kb metadata value (15 KB) is not actually validated by the verifier; the verifier instead checks that output file size exceeds 105% of input size.
